prestazioni: M50B25TU (S50B30) 3.0L I6 swap with a custom-built Motec M150 ECU, utilizing a Bosch Motorsport 0 261 200 433 high-flow fuel pump and Siemens Deka 80lb/hr injectors for a target of 450whp on 98 RON fuel, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system featuring a MagnaFlow 14815 catalytic converter and a Supersprint rear silencer for optimal backpressure management

Bilstein PSS9 coilovers with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (front: 225 lb/in, rear: 280 lb/in) and custom spherical bearing top mounts from 034 Motorsport, paired with a BMW Motorsport 333mm front brake kit (840Ci calipers) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, with braided stainless steel brake lines from HEL Performance

Custom 3.23:1 limited-slip differential from OS Giken with a 25-spline output, reinforced with a Wavetrac differential and paired with a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission swap (from E34 M5), utilizing a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (400Nm torque capacity) and a custom aluminum flywheel from Fidanza
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (E31-specific) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, finished in BMW Motorsport Nogaro Silver (305) with a 3M 2080 Gloss Black wrap on the roof and pillars

OEM BMW Individual 850CSi front bumper retrofit with custom LED angel eyes (Lux H8 V4) and a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a functional NACA duct for engine bay cooling, paired with a rear spoiler from a BMW 850CSi (OEM part # 51-71-2-226-622)

BBS RS II 18x9.5 ET20 (front) and 18x11 ET25 (rear) wheels with custom offsets, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear), paired with OEM BMW 850CSi side skirts and a custom titanium exhaust tip setup from Remus
